s: Allow you to manage the credentials stored in your Nextcloud Passman app.
d: This is an Android app for the Nextcloud password manager Passman. This app is only compatible with Passman V2.x or higher. Features * Setup app (enter the nextcloud server settings or use SSO) * App start password option based on the android user authentication * View, add, rename and delete vaults * Login to vault * Display credential list * View, add, edit and delete credentials * Add, download and delete files * OTP generation * Basic Android autofill implementation * Password generator * Encrypted offline cache * Encrypted stored vault and cloud connection passwords Requirements * Nextcloud * Nextcloud Passman App
